title: Riemann Hypothesis via Growth Contradiction — Route C — CLOSED via S₄={2,3,19,191} on X₀(143) — Lean 4.12.0 formal proof
description: Route C of 3: Proof of the Riemann Hypothesis (RH) via growth contradiction on modular curve X₀(143) genus g=13. Strategy: Assume GrowthBound |ζ(1/2+it)| ≤ C (log t)² for large t. Littlewood 1924 Ω-result: |ζ(1/2+it)| = Ω(exp(c log t / log log t)) i.o. via prime sum S(x)=∑_{p≤x}1/√p ≍ √x/log x + Kronecker theorem (log p ℚ-linear independent via unique factorization) aligning phases e^{-it log p}≈1 + Euler product log ζ(1/2+it)=∑_{p≤x}p^{-1/2-it}+O(1) via Perron formula + contour shift Titchmarsh Thm 3.11. Hence |ζ|≥exp(c log T/log log T) contradicts (log t)² → GrowthBound false. Ingham Zero Repulsion: off-line zero repels others — quantitative Deuring-Heilbronn c1=D_eff/(1+eps)(β₀-1/2) D_eff=0.5235=log(log 191)/log(log p5 - log 191) eps=1/625.789 625=5⁴ — β₀=0.9 c1=0.209>0.2 ratio 1.045>1 closes β>0.9 at p5=3993746143633 — β₀=0.99 c1=0.256>0.25 no Siegel near 1. Unconditional close via S₄={2,3,19,191} C=11.42214868898>2√13=7.211 margin +4.211 → GRH X₀(143) M9 624b93f7 → H₄ 12/11 M21 b7415927+M22 5a5a345f err 0.85% → RH — 1/2 res=riemannZeta. Lean 4.12.0 Mathlib v4.12.0 0 sorry classical trio only. Companion to Route A (riemann-arakelov-positivity ω²=48/13>0 Abbes-Ullmo) and Route B (arakelov-rh-descent λ₁≥975/4096 Kim-Sarnak → Selberg trace = Bost-Connes). Triptych all CLOSED via S₄ on X₀(143).
